---
title: "Perspectives: Luis Montilla on making science fiction concepts a reality in the scholarly ecosystem"
date: 2023-11-20
categories:
  - Scholarly metadata
  - Scholarly infraestructure
image: "image.jpg"
doi: https://doi.org/10.64000/rfdpw-qe476
author: 
    name: Luis Montilla
    orcid: 0000-0002-7079-6775
abstract: "Hello, readers! My name is Luis, and I’ve recently started a new role as the Technical Community Manager at Crossref, where I aim to bridge the gap between some of our services and our community awareness to enhance the Research Nexus. I’m excited to share my thoughts with you."
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}

|Related items|
|:-:|
||
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
{{< altmetrics type=large-donut details=true >}}
:::

::::
